skills.name: jbang
skills.description: JBang as a universal Java launcher and tool manager — run JARs, Maven artifacts, and remote scripts without writing any code. Covers app install, JDK management, catalogs, and CI/CD integration.

skills.name: jbang-scripting
skills.description: How to write Java scripts with JBang — single-file programs with inline dependencies, directives, templates, and IDE support. No project setup required.
